tagline: Turn headlines into your next smart move.

designSystem.style: Modern editorial with vibrant violet-purple accent. Clean card-based layout with layered information hierarchy, soft gradient headers, and micro-interaction press effects. Light mode features soft lavender backgrounds with white cards; dark mode uses deep navy-purple surfaces with elevated contrast.

screens: Today Feed — Daily action feed with impact-scored stories, expandable depth layers, and actionable checklist
Context Lens — Situational story groupings (Commuting, Family, Career, Money, Home, Health) with active context banner
My Boards — Pinned story boards for tracking developing coverage across life situations
Settings — Profile overview, light/dark theme toggle, content source management, and notification preferences
